popularStory.headline: William Bonville, 1st Baron Bonville KG (12/31 August 1392-18 February 1461)
popularStory.description: William Bonville, 1st Baron Bonville KG (12/31 August 1392-18 February 1461) was a member of the English peerage and an important, powerful landowner in the southwest of England during the late middle …

zh.lifeSummary: 當William Bonville於1392年8月12日出生在英國戴文書特時，他的父親Sir John Bonville21歲，母親Elizabeth FitzRoger21歲。他於1427年10月9日與Elizabeth Courtenay在英國結婚。他於1461年在英國被列為k.g. knight 。他去世於1461年2月18日在英國賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯享年68歲。

nameMeanings.name: Bonville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: variant of   Bonneville   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Bonneville
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Francois, Liette, Normand, Pierre.
French: habitational name from any of numerous places called Bonneville, from Old French bonne ‘good’ + ville ‘settlement’. Compare Bonville .
Altered form of French Bonnevialle: habitational name from Bonnevialle in the central part of France.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Bonville was born on 12 August 1392, in Shute, Devon, England, his father, Sir John Bonville, was 21 and his mother, Elizabeth FitzRoger, was 21. He married Elizabeth Courtenay on 9 October 1427, in England. In 1461, at the age of 68, his occupation is listed as k.g. knight  in England. He died on 18 February 1461, in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Bonville est né le 12 août 1392, à Shute, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Bonville, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth FitzRoger, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Courtenay le 9 octobre 1427, à Angleterre. En 1461, à l’âge de 68 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est k.g. knight  à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 18 février 1461, à St Albans, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Bonville am 12. August 1392 in Shute, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Bonville 21 und seine Mutter Elizabeth FitzRoger 21. Er hat am 9. Oktober 1427 in England Elizabeth Courtenay geheiratet. 1461, als er 68 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als k.g. knight  in England aufgeführt. Er starb am 18. Februar 1461 im Alter von 68 Jahren in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Bonvilleが1392年8月12日にイギリスデボンシュトで生まれた時，父Sir John Bonvilleは21歳，母Elizabeth FitzRogerは21歳であった。1427年10月9日にイギリスでElizabeth Courtenayと結婚した。1461年，68歳の時，イギリスでの職業はk.g. knight と記録されている。彼は1461年2月18日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンスで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Bonville(이)가 1392년 8월 12일 영국 데폰 슈트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Bonville(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth FitzRoger(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1427년 10월 9일 영국에서 Elizabeth Courtenay(와)과 결혼했다. 1461년, 68세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국에서 k.g. knight 이었다. 그는 1461년 2월 18일 영국 허트퍼드실르 스트 알반스에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Bonville nasceu em 12 de agosto de 1392, em Shute, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Bonville, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth FitzRoger, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Courtenay em 9 de outubro de 1427, em Inglaterra. Em 1461, com 68 anos, sua profissão aparece como k.g. knight  em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 18 de fevereiro de 1461, em St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Bonville родился 12 августа 1392 г. в местности шут, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Bonville было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth FitzRoger, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Courtenay 9 октября 1427 г. в местности Англия. В 1461 году, в возрасте 68 лет,  он работал по профессии k.g. knight  в местности Англия. Он умер 18 февраля 1461 г. в местности ст албанс, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 68 лет.
